theScene: Walking away with the heavy serving tray in hand, you get started with your shift, diligently taking orders and delivering them, all the while doing your best not to get distracted by the nightlife patrons' conspicuous stares, lecherous comments, and questing gropes, more than one hand and tail squeezing or grazing against your legs, your butt, or even your crotch as you go through your stint.

However, you've barely begun settling into the routine of your waitering gig when you're interrupted by someone tapping you on the shoulder, prompting you to curiously turn around and find yourself face to face with a familiar figure.
music/Mountain/Purple Planet Music - Energy - Salsa Nites (2_13) 120bpm.mp3

Gracefully, Nara the Mountain dancer steps back slightly to take you in, hands crossed behind her back, rocking her light body on her heels as she looks you up and down with a musing, slightly mischievous expression, a thoughtful hum floating on her lips.

Fancy seeing you here, [ThePlayerName]... Sayyyyy, would you happen to be willing to let me steal you away for a moment as my... Mmh... Dance spectator? Judge? Appraiser?... It'd be paid work, of course!

The night subsequently turns into a blur of picking up empty dishes and delivering full ones, taking orders and communicating them, one hour after the next passing by to the rhythm of the Goddess' Embrace fruitful business, until Belle eventually lets you know you're good and can collect your payment, your shift thus ending with somehow no other solicitations.
Great!♪ I knew I could count on you.
Without further ado, she happily grabs your hand and pulls you after her, leaving the common room's patrons behind to lead you upstairs...

... then into one of the inn's vacant rooms where she closes the door behind the two of you... then keeps energetically taking charge of the situation, putting her hands on your shoulders to guide you to the room's big pink bed where she sits you down, your body comfortably half-sinking into the plush mass under Nara's cheerful gaze.
Perfect.♪ So, all you need to do is watch and let me know your impressions, okay? {i}Mwah!{/i}

You blurt out the word without even needing to think about it, a sprawling litany of reverent praise coming to your mind, but failing to cross through your crashing thoughts, veneration and lust rampaging in your head only to be sublimated into felicitous rapture when your goddess' expression softens and she answers in a husky murmur.

Until your wracked body can't take it anymore and you black out, carried into beatific unconsciousness by one last searing pulse...

Your heart jumps joyfully in your chest as Nara seems to materialize out of thin air, as incomparably gorgeous as ever, your goddess sauntering towards you with undisguised lust in her eyes, the vision immediately reigniting your barely diminished libido back to full force and urging you to immediately rush to her in worshipful haste, when suddenly...

However, your gaze is more immediately drawn to a note on the bedside table which you curiously pick up, squinting your still sleepy eyes to make sense of the slightly messy pencil writing covering the scrap of paper.

{i}Hiya, [ThePlayerName]!
After I kissed you, you were out like a light. Seems like my new technique worked! I hope it wasn't too rough on you. Judging by how much you were... enjoying yourself in your sleep, it seems like it was {i}very{/i} effective. I hope it was good for you! Your mind roiling at the unexpected 'loan', you feel your anger begin to rise and start fumingly wondering how you should deal with this situation, when your eye is caught by more writing at the bottom of the letter.
{i}P.P.S.: Just kidding! XD I left the money inside the dresser ^^{/i}
Shaking your head as you recover the Eros, you sigh and stash your lewd-gotten gains, then redress yourself, getting ready to attack the day.
Not knowing how to feel about Nara's generosity, you nevertheless take your payment, then redress yourself, getting ready to attack the day.

However, even as you step out of your room and can confirm for good that you're no longer in some sort of dreamy Nara land, you can't shake off the persistent influence of the sexy dancer, the sights and sounds of her lascivious show sticking to your senses, just like the memory of the uncountable time you spent surrounded by so many of her, making you feel like this lingering worshipful suggestibility won't be easy to shake off...
